mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fantasticks
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Playbill for the Fantasticks. Presented by Rex Partington, Producing Director. Directed by Kevin Costigan. Musical Direction by Logan Brown. Scenic Design by Rex Partington. Costume Design by Pamela Hale. Lighting Design by William Sauerbrey. Stage Manager: Christine Santmyers.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Theater
Virginia
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
